report.summary: Design polish cycle 3: audited 2 new build-cycle pages (KYA guide, Sui privacy guide), created OG images for both, fixed responsive typography, heading hierarchy, FAQ consistency, semantic nav, table accessibility, and focus-visible styles across both pages.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: know-your-agent-kya-guide-2026: Wrapped ToC in semantic <nav aria-label='Table of Contents'> element
know-your-agent-kya-guide-2026: Added focus-visible:outline-2 focus-visible:outline-[#6366f1] to all 10 ToC anchor links for keyboard navigation
know-your-agent-kya-guide-2026: Added aria-label and scope='col' to both data tables (KYA Architecture Layers, Key Companies Building KYA Infrastructure)
sui-private-transactions: Fixed H1 from fixed 42px to responsive clamp(28px, 5vw, 42px) with lineHeight 1.15 for mobile readability
sui-private-transactions: Changed ToC heading from h3 to h2 to fix heading hierarchy (was skipping h2 level)
sui-private-transactions: Wrapped ToC in semantic <nav aria-label='Table of Contents'> element
sui-private-transactions: Added focus-visible outline styles to all 9 ToC anchor links
sui-private-transactions: Converted FAQ from static h3/p pairs to collapsible <details>/<summary> accordion pattern (consistent with KYA page and other learn guides)
sui-private-transactions: Added aria-label='Privacy Solutions Comparison' and scope='col' to comparison table headers

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: know-your-agent-kya-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — dark theme with agent identity network diagram, gradient title, AI & DeFi badge, key terms bar

OG image: sui-private-transactions-seal-framework-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — dark theme with ZK proof visualization, Seal framework box, privacy shield icon, 866 TPS stat callout, Layer 1 + Privacy badges

sections.title: Pages Audited
items: learn/know-your-agent-kya-guide-2026 (ToC nav semantics + focus styles + table accessibility + OG image created)
learn/sui-private-transactions-seal-framework-guide-2026 (responsive H1 + heading hierarchy + ToC nav semantics + focus styles + FAQ accordion conversion + table accessibility + OG image created)
